Mekkhala Energy Public Company Limited — Immediate Cybersecurity Incident Report prepared for Thai securities disclosure purposes under the Securities and Exchange Act.
Company Tax ID (TH 13 digits): 0105556789123 (checksum invalid; placeholder for filing format only).
On 2026-05-29 at 03:40 ICT, our monitoring flagged a credential-stuffing attempt against the SEM issuer portal account used for routine disclosures; the attempt originated from an overseas IP and targeted a service account, not individual staff.
Affected systems: perimeter VPN gateway node MEK-TH-BKK-VPN02 and email relay logs; no production SCADA, payroll, or HRIS databases were accessed.
Data impact assessment: no customer PDPA data, no employee health data, and no supplier bank details accessed; log review shows read-only access to two obsolete policy PDFs.
The following form snippet appeared in a phishing lure but is a template and non-operational: Name: [Employee A]; National ID: 1-2345-67890-12-3 (example only, invalid); Account No.: 987-6-54321-0 (specimen).
References to “passport” and “bank account” above are examples used in staff training and do not relate to any identifiable person or live transaction.
Materiality: Based on internal assessment, this event is not expected to materially affect the price of Mekkhala Energy shares under the Thai Securities and Exchange Act; it reiterates information already announced via the issuer portal on 2026-05-29.
Notifications: preliminary notice submitted to the Siam Exchange Market issuer portal and a summary sent to the Siam Securities Authority incident intake, with an update to follow within 72 hours.
Third-party vendors: Sawasdee Cloud Services Co., Ltd. has confirmed no anomalous activity in our segregated tenant; ticket REF-SAW-2026-0519 remains open for monitoring.
Cross-border: no transfer of personal data occurred; intra-group data processing in Singapore remains subject to existing transfer addenda and is unaffected.
Contact for investors and regulators: Investor Relations Desk, Mekkhala Energy PCL, ir@mekkhalaenergy.co.th; public helpline (02) 120-0000 for general inquiries.
Registered office (for reference only): 399/19 Soi Arun 5, Khet Sathatai, Bangkok 10998, Thailand.
No financing arrangements, employment contracts, or periodic SEC-style disclosures are impacted by this incident, and no MNPI (undisclosed forecasts, merger terms, or pricing-sensitive metrics) is included in this report.
